steps.title: Spot the preventive focus
steps.content: The example details how “people can take simple steps...to avoid introducing” invasive organisms. The emphasis on human action preventing the problem is the decisive signal.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
”Preventable” directly fits because it expresses the idea that biodiversity loss can be prevented through human action, exactly as the example demonstrates. The other three choices address the problem's certainty (undeniable), frequency (common), or severity (concerning), but none capture the preventability the example emphasizes.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
